_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: Stablecoin dry powder accumulation and institutional ETF bid support a slow grind upward from Anxiety into Complacency, but VIX elevation and MVRV weakness prevent conviction until risk-off hedging unwinds.
next_move.brains_agree: Partial — analyst explicitly calls UP to Complacency at low conviction; narrative supports the accumulation thesis but does not commit to a forward phase, so the lean follows the analyst's directional read weighted by Jordan's higher trust (7.67 vs 6.00).
next_move.confirmed_if: BTC momentum sustains above 55, VIX drops below 55, and funding remains tame
next_move.invalidated_if: VIX climbs above 75 and BTC momentum rolls under 40 with funding turning negative
